Metric: 1. All costs in EUR (€) as of 2026-05-26, subject to currency/inflation adjustments
2. Y1-Y3 assumes 0% voluntary churn (sticky hardware infrastructure), 2.5% involuntary (hardware failure)
4. Support model: 1 FTE covers up to 500 locations with ticket system + knowledge base automation
5. OpEx scaling: AWS grows linearly; support fixed until 1000; marketing variable (CAC = €2500)
6. CAPEX amortization: Hardware (3-year useful life), Software (5-year), Infrastructure (immediately)
7. Risk scenarios: Conservative = 50% market adoption; Stretch = 2x market adoption; Base = projections above
8. Exit assumptions: Strategic buyer (Tuya, Home Automation platforms) at 8x revenue multiple Y3
9. Geographic expansion assumes EU-first (lower support cost); LATAM/APAC would add regional OpEx ~15%
10. Regulatory compliance costs (PCI-DSS, RGPD, audits) modeled as fixed base + per-location variable
